items.summary: Andree Jeglertz says his job now is to win more titles with Manchester City after they completed a domestic double with a Women's FA Cup final victory over Brighton.

items.title: Exeter shock Leicester for crucial win to set up final-round play-off drama

items.summary: ARSENAL fans have caused chaos in the streets of the capital as the club celebrates its Premier League title.
